adapters.protocol: SAM3 global vs tiled instance count; optional diameter distribution if masks are clean
adapters.command: Add TimberSeg downloader, then run a tiled count eval analogous to rebar_sahi_eval.py.

adapters.recommended_next_action: Acquire data first: Add TimberSeg downloader, then run a tiled count eval analogous to rebar_sahi_eval.py.

adapters.protocol: fish gate -> major-axis length -> tray/homography or label length comparison
adapters.blocker: Need Zenodo record selection and label schema parser.

adapters.protocol: Reuse T-LESS CAD+pose adapter over additional BOP families with category holdout
adapters.command: Extend data/scripts/download_metric.sh with hb/ycbv; reuse tless_upper_bound.py.

adapters.recommended_next_action: Acquire data first: Extend data/scripts/download_metric.sh with hb/ycbv; reuse tless_upper_bound.py.

adapters.protocol: round sign prompt -> 2D/3D extent -> snap to standard sign diameters
adapters.command: Add KITTI adapter after sign-category extraction is validated.
adapters.blocker: Need robust sign filtering; KITTI object labels do not directly isolate all sign subclasses.
adapters.recommended_next_action: Acquire data first: Add KITTI adapter after sign-category extraction is validated.

adapters.protocol: prompt chair/table/sofa -> RGB-D fusion -> 3DOD box dimensions

adapters.blocker: Need sample download path and 3DOD/depth frame parser.
adapters.recommended_next_action: Acquire data first: Add ARKitScenes downloader/adapter; compare to ADT dynamic object result.
